_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/Visceral Leishmaniasis/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

preauth.label: Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment

claim.label: Post treatment Blood investigation report (CBC, Platelet etc.)

ppd_preauth.q: Did the patient have any of the symptoms like Irregular bouts of high fever, Substantial weight loss with enlarged liver and spleen?
Did the patient test positive for rK39 test?

cpd_claim.q: Was patient treated with IV fluids, IV Dextrose, Steroids NSAIDS?

common_queries: Clinical symptoms (irregular fever, weight loss, enlarged liver and spleen, anaemia) not documented or not meeting criteria for Visceral Leishmaniasis.
rK39 test report not submitted or result is negative.
Treatment includes IV fluids, IV Dextrose, Steroids, or NSAIDS without documented justification.
Pre-authorization clinical notes lack evaluation findings, indications, or the planned line of treatment.
Post-treatment blood investigation report (CBC, Platelet etc.) is missing or incomplete at claim submission.

additional_information.min_doctor_qualification_desirable: MD / DNB equivalent (in General Medicine, Pediatric Medicine)
